title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Sodexo India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Sodexo India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Sodexo India Global Group in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sodexo India Global Group:
Sodexo India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sodexo India Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
